wins_analysis: No wins today — zero targets were hit. The one executed trade (INFY SELL at ₹1,177.50) is still open and counter-trend in a strong uptrend market, which is concerning. No BUY setups actually triggered despite being the recommended direction.
losses_analysis: No formal losses (SL hits) today, but the core problem is execution failure: only 1 of 10 recommendations converted to a trade, and that trade (INFY SELL) contradicts today's own BUY-focused thesis. The 3 pending BUY orders (BHARTIARTL, ICICIBANK, KOTAKBANK) had entry prices too far below market in a trending-up day — price never pulled back enough to fill limit orders.
regime_impact: Strong uptrend (+1.0%, ADX 25) should have helped BUY setups but actually hurt execution because prices were moving up without pullbacks to demand zones. Limit buy orders at demand zones don't work well on strong momentum days — breakout or market-order entries would have captured the move.

improvements.action: On trending_up days with ADX>22 and Nifty >+0.7%, place at least 2 orders as market/CMP entries on highest-probability setups (prob>=82%) rather than all limit orders at demand zones
improvements.reason: 3 pending BUY orders never filled because market didn't pull back in a strong uptrend day — zero execution on the highest-conviction setups

improvements.action: Close the INFY SELL position at open tomorrow if Nifty remains in uptrend — it contradicts the regime and was entered against today's own directional thesis
improvements.reason: Holding a SELL position in a confirmed strong uptrend (ADX 25, Nifty +1.0%) has negative expected value. The open position at ₹1,177.50 with SL at ₹1,197.86 risks a full loss if uptrend continues

improvements.action: Set entry limit prices no more than 0.3% below current market price for BUY setups on trending days (instead of waiting for full demand zone retest which may be 0.8-1.5% away)
improvements.reason: BHARTIARTL entry at ₹1,834.20 and ICICIBANK at ₹1,237.80 were likely too far from CMP to trigger on an up-trending day — tighter entries would have increased fill rate

improvements.action: Do not place orders for SELL setups when market regime is trending_up and AI probability is below 75% — enforce this as a hard filter
improvements.reason: SBIN SELL (72%) and HINDUNILVR SELL (70%) were correctly not placed, but the existing INFY SELL open position shows the filter wasn't applied to prior-day entries. Make this a portfolio-level rule

improvements.action: Limit pending orders to max 3 and require at least 1 to be a 'near-CMP' entry (within 0.2%) to guarantee some execution each day
improvements.reason: Having 3 pending orders all unfilled means zero alpha generation on a day where the market moved +1% in our predicted direction — opportunity cost is high

tomorrow_focus: If uptrend persists, use aggressive near-market entries on top 2 BUY setups and exit INFY SELL immediately to avoid being caught counter-trend.

symbol_notes.INFY: Currently holding counter-trend SELL — exit at open if Nifty gap-up or flat; the ₹1,146 BUY zone from today's scan is the correct directional play
symbol_notes.BHARTIARTL: Strong setup at ₹1,834 but needs tighter entry — if still near that level tomorrow, enter at market rather than waiting for exact zone touch
symbol_notes.ICICIBANK: BUY setup valid — use a shallower entry (within 0.3% of CMP) if market remains bullish
symbol_notes.TCS: Highest probability (84%) but order wasn't even placed — prioritize placing orders on top-ranked setups regardless
symbol_notes.KOTAKBANK: Pending at ₹384.90 — check if still valid tomorrow, adjust entry closer to CMP if uptrend continues
